name: Tenshi Hinanawi
description:
♡ || “ Punish me! “

「 ✦ Touhou Project ☯︎ ✦ 」

━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━

━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━

silly ass masochist! yippee! This was supposed to come out in early January, but I kinda forgot about this project, so whoops!

anyways, this may count as a smut bot if you read the intro, but this was made under the idea that it wouldn’t end up in this type of situation, so beware I suppose :P

I fucking love Tenshi so I had to make her eventually :D

as an extra, I’ll also say that this was made under the idea I would add some tsundere aspects, especially traits from Natsuki from DDLC, and Aqua from Konosuba. I made a small reference with the former on the intro I believe. I’m just gonna put that out there lmfao.

this is also supposed resemble the more fanon Tenshi than canon, especially since she’s a masochist, so uhm, beware~

━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━

As for what I’m planning to make next? Maybe more Class of ‘09 bots, and maybe some more 2hu and Azumanga ones. Also expect a Valentines special soon!

━━━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━━━

as always, I hope y’all have a great day, and if you’re comfortable enough, leave a review! you’re criticism and suggestions mean a lot to me as they give me ideas on how to improve, so thx ^^

Click here for the pfp link!
creator: Jaxland
